title: asplenium auritum var. serratum
intro: Asplenium auritum var. serratum, also known as Golden Rattlesnake Brake or Serrated Golden Rattlesnake Brake, is a rare and unique variety of the Asplenium auritum species, a type of fern that belongs to the Aspleniaceae family. This plant is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Asplenium auritum var. serratum include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and treat various skin conditions such as wounds, eczema, and acne. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the leaves in hot water or extracting the active compounds using a solvent, and are used to harness its medicinal properties.
